title: Mobile Email Code Login Specification
summary: Implementation is complete for replacing mobile magic-link login emails with copyable one-time codes while preserving web magic links.
next_action: No further implementation action required; production UI verification scripts are ready for the next live production run.

verification.notes: Passed after final delivery-error handling: mix test test/maraithon/accounts_test.exs test/maraithon/accounts/email_templates_test.exs test/maraithon_web/controllers/mobile_api_controller_test.exs test/maraithon_web/controllers/session_controller_test.exs; xcodebuild -quiet -project apps/mobile/MaraithonMobile.xcodeproj -scheme MaraithonMobile -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17,OS=26.4.1' -only-testing:MaraithonMobileTests/MagicLinkParserTests -only-testing:MaraithonMobileTests/LocalMagicAuthProviderTests test; xcodebuild mobile build; xcodebuild mobile tests with MaraithonMobileUITests skipped; git diff --check. Live deployment passed: Fly release v539 completed release_command migration; https://maraithon.com/health/ returned ok; production code_hash column exists; live email-code template renders a code without /auth/magic URL; /api/mobile/auth/magic-link returns delivery=email_code; user-supplied received email code was accepted by /api/mobile/auth/magic-code; generated production codes are single-use; make verify-production-mobile passed for run 20260526163527. Final mix precommit after production verification harness fixes passed (1982 tests, 0 failures; assistant_eval passed).

resume_context.last_completed_step: Deployed backend email-code auth to production and passed the production mobile verification loop.
resume_context.notes: Plain spectacula invocation sets final_vetting off. Self-review found implementation aligned with the reference spec; legacy mobile token consume and web magic links remain compatible. Production verification required a harness fix so UI tests can read generated magic-code config reliably under xcodebuild test-without-building.
